◎简　　介  

　　When her husband died, who had been ill for a long time, Youngbun leaves behind her stepson Yong-jin, and heads for Taebaek, her hometown. Meanwhile, Hanhee, who runs a Pilates academy in Taebaek, is longing for her mother who abandoned her when she was a child.
introduction: When her husband died, who had been ill for a long time, Youngbun leaves behind her stepson Yong-jin, and heads for Taebaek, her hometown. Meanwhile, Hanhee, who runs a Pilates academy in Taebaek, is longing for her mother who abandoned her when she was a child.
